name: pne-warehouse-intelligence
description: Connect AI coding agents to PNE for warehouse-native analysis, SQL planning, Sentinel review and evidence-backed answers.

interface.shortDescription: Ask your warehouse through PNE from agent tools.
interface.longDescription: PNE Warehouse Intelligence connects agent surfaces to a hosted or local PNE runtime. It sends warehouse context, asks PNE for analysis plans, routes generated SQL through Sentinel review, and returns evidence, caveats and follow-up questions.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this workspace already has projects and analyzed artifacts.
Inspect whether a project has sources, projections, query specs and runtime outputs.
Can we compute LTV or ROAS from these tables?
